Our Mission

Cloud discounts shouldn't require a leap of faith

Cloud savings usually require risky long-term commitments you pay even when usage drops. Usage AI changes that: 3-year rates with the freedom to exit anytime.
Save 30â€“50% with zero lock-in or engineering effort.

Aligned Incentives

We earn a percentage of what we save you. No savings, no fee ever. Our success is literally tied to yours.

Zero Risk

Our buyback guarantee means if your usage drops, we absorb the commitment. You never get stuck holding the bag.

Zero Engineering Lift

Read only access, no code changes, no agents to install. Connect in 5 minutes and see savings immediately.
